description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a long, precision barrel and an adjustable stock, optimized for stability and accuracy. The body is constructed primarily from matte black metal with polymer components, including a textured pistol grip and a robust, adjustable buttstock. A large telescopic scope is mounted on the top rail, indicating the rifle is intended for long-range targeting. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard, and the rifle includes a prominent handguard with a rail system for accessory attachment. The muzzle appears to be fitted with a device, likely a flash hider or compensator, to reduce recoil or muzzle flash. Overall, the rifle's design is sleek and functional, suitable for tactical or precision shooting in urban environments.
description: A modern, tactical rifle with a long barrel, adjustable stock, telescopic scope, and detachable box magazine, finished in matte black metal and polymer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile, muzzle device, and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the barrel, the mounted scope, adjustable stock, and the detachable box magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the adjustable buttstock, pistol grip, and the back of the scope.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the stock adjustment mechanism and scope mount.
